name: Peaches and Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the cake flour, baking powder, and salt onto waxed paper; stir in chopped walnuts.
2. Lightly grease an 8x8x2-3/4 inch or springform pan.
3. In a medium bowl with an electric mixer on high speed, beat eggs until frothy.
4. Gradually beat in sugar and continue beating at high speed until the mixture is thick and creamy (at least 5 minutes).
5. Stir water and vanilla into the egg mixture.
6. Gently fold in the flour mixture.
7. Pour batter into prepared pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes or until the center springs back when lightly touched with a fingertip.
9. Cool in pan on wire rack for 5 minutes.
10. Loosen cake around sides; release and remove from bottom of the pan. Cool completely.
11. Cut cake into three thin layers.
12. Drain peaches; reserve syrup.
13. Combine reserved sherry, peach slices (8), and chopped peaches with the reserved syrup in a small bowl.
14. Beat cream until stiff in a medium bowl.
15. Place bottom cake layer on serving plate.
16. Spoon half of the sherry-peach mixture over the layer and spread with about 1 cup of whipped cream.
17. Repeat with second layer, topping with remaining layer.
18. Spread a layer of whipped cream over top layer.
19. Pipe swirls in remaining whipped cream using pastry bag fitted with star tip on top of cake.
20. Garnish with reserved peach slices and walnuts.
21. Chill until ready to serve.
